confidenceLevels.name: low
confidenceLevels.definition: Promising but weakly supported; use only with explicit assumptions.

confidenceLevels.name: medium
confidenceLevels.definition: Supported by evidence or audit logic but not yet repeatedly validated.

confidenceLevels.name: high
confidenceLevels.definition: Supported by multiple evidence points or strong repeated use across contexts.

confidenceLevels.name: validated
confidenceLevels.definition: Validated by review, outcomes, repeated project use, or formal evaluation.
